name: SEO Topic Cluster
purpose: Generate a complete SEO topic cluster with keyword mapping, blog titles, internal linking structure, and content plan

inputs.name: contentCount
inputs.description: Number of content pieces to generate

constraints: Never mix business logic into healing content
process: Identify core topic and search intent
Classify search intent per keyword (informational, transactional, navigational)
Generate cluster page titles with keyword targets
evaluationCriteria: All titles are unique and keyword-targeted
Internal linking forms a coherent cluster
safetyRules: No emotional vulnerability targeting in SEO content
No clinical claims without evidence basis
All mental health content includes appropriate disclaimers
